testing_progress.highlight: bal-devnet-7 stable with 100% EVM fuzzing participation; clients iterating on benchmarking
EIP-7975 (eth/70) and EIP-8159 (eth/71) confirmed implemented across all EL clients
Final test release tests-bal@v7.3.0 will be cut once EIP-8037 lands in forks/amsterdam

fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: glamsterdam-devnet-4 abandoned following ePBS split at ~slot 22800; root cause: should_build_on_full / PTC timing bug
EIP-8045 (exclude slashed validators from proposing) included in glamsterdam-devnet-5; all CL teams confirmed ready or near-ready
Consensus: glamsterdam-devnet-5 CL-only; all EL changes (EIP-8246, EIP-2780, EIP-8038, EIP-7954, EIP-7997) deferred to glamsterdam-devnet-6
Benchmarking optimizations on bal-devnet-7 are the primary EL blocker; must complete before final gas cost numbers can land

spec_changes.highlight: EIP-7928 spec change merged: SlotChanges must contain at least one StorageChange (no empty sets)
EIP-7928 state-access decoupling PR open: charge 100 gas pre-depth/balance checks, then remaining 2500 after; Reth proposed, most clients need changes
EIP-8037 auth refund expansion PR open (5-rule scheme): refund state gas for invalid or net-zero authorization list entries
EIP-2780 simplification pending: remove self-transfer and precompile carve-outs; awaiting benchmark results before merge

action_items.action: EL teams review EIP-7928 state-access decoupling PR before ACDE Thursday
danceratopz to open ETH R&D thread outlining glamsterdam-devnet-5 scope for async consensus

decisions.decision: EIP-8045 included in glamsterdam-devnet-5; all CL teams in agreement
glamsterdam-devnet-5 is CL-only (EIP-8045 + stability fixes); all EL changes target glamsterdam-devnet-6
Priority order for EL work: benchmarking/optimizations > self-destruct burn (EIP-8246) > EIP-7997
Gas repricing breakout calls ended; all discussion moves to ACDT

targets.target: glamsterdam-devnet-5 launch - as early as tomorrow (June 2), pending alpha.9 spec release
bal-devnet-8 / glamsterdam-devnet-6 decision deferred to ACDT next week
